description_long: This object is a wooden barrel with a classic cylindrical shape, featuring two prominent metallic bands encircling its body for structural reinforcement. The wood is rendered in a pixelated, blocky style with various shades of brown, giving it a rustic and sturdy appearance. The ends of the barrel are flat and circular, with one end displaying a small, square metallic detail that may represent a bung or plug. The metallic bands are a dull gray, contrasting with the warm tones of the wood. The surface texture appears rough and unfinished, typical of barrels used for storage or transport in urban or industrial settings. There are no visible handles or decorative markings, emphasizing its utilitarian function.
description: A pixelated wooden barrel with two gray metal bands and flat circular ends, featuring a rustic, utilitarian look.
description_view_0: The side view shows the full length of the barrel with two gray metal bands and a wood grain texture.
description_view_1: The end view reveals a flat, circular wooden face with a small metallic detail, likely a bung or plug.
description_view_2: Another side view, nearly identical to view 0, showing the opposite side of the barrel with the same banding.
description_view_3: The opposite end view displays a flat, circular wooden face without any visible metallic detail.
